story: An aquarium owner named Kaito noticed a white spot on his clownfish's fin. He remembered that his neighbor's fish had recovered from a similar condition with the addition of garlic to their food. Kaito added garlic to the tank and continued his regular maintenance routine. The spots worsened over two weeks. A specialist later identified the infection as a fungal condition requiring antifungal medication. Kaito acknowledged he hadn't researched the symptom beyond his neighbor's anecdotal experience.
